summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Smart Election Patrol system with all critical features working perfectly. Verified smooth marker movement with 1-sec LERP + 60fps animation, live ETA/distance tracking, custom popup cards, status progression (Responding→Approaching→Almost There→Arrived), premium UI components, and complete incident lifecycle from map selection to resolution.
passed_tests: GET /api/personnel returns 12 officers all with 'free' status
POST /api/incident assigns nearest free officer correctly with distance calculation
PATCH /api/incident/status resolves incident and frees officer
Officer status changes from 'free' to 'busy' after assignment
Idle state shows subtle hint pill at bottom: 'Tap the map to report an incident'
Map click shows blue pin and bottom card with precise coordinates (14.68191, 77.60064)
Red 'Report Incident' FAB button appears in bottom card
Report creates incident and custom popup card appears ON THE MAP
Custom popup has white background, rounded corners, shadow (not default Leaflet popup)
Popup shows officer name (SI Rajesh Kumar), rank (Sub Inspector), badge (AP-001)
Live distance display in popup: '🚓 973 m away | ETA: 1.5 min' format
Accept Dispatch button in popup works and starts tracking
Top tracking bar appears with status, distance, ETA, and officer name
Status progression verified: Responding → Approaching → Almost There → Arrived
Live metrics update every second: distance decreases smoothly (784m → 22m)
ETA decreases continuously during tracking (1.2 min → 2 sec)
Officer red pin moves smoothly towards amber incident pin (no marker recreation)
Smooth marker movement uses 60fps requestAnimationFrame with setLatLng only
1-second LERP factor (0.12) for logical position updates working correctly
Polyline visible from officer to incident during tracking
Incident resolves when officer reaches <20m distance
Resolved state shows 'Incident Resolved - Officer reached the location'
Toast notification: 'Incident resolved — officer arrived!'
'New Report' button in resolved card works
Full cycle repeatable - reset returns to idle state
Premium UI: FAB buttons, top tracking bar, card-based design all working
Google Maps-style pins for all 12 officers (green for free, red for busy)
CARTO Voyager map tiles load correctly
Top bar displays 'Election Patrol' with shield icon

success_percentage.performance: 100% (smooth animations, live updates, no marker recreation)
